message:
fix(lab/conformal): skip prediction on calibration-completing observation

The predict() method tested the calibration-completing observation
against a calibration set that included itself, violating the
exchangeability assumption of split conformal prediction. This
could produce invalid coverage bounds and mask oracle anomalies.

Fixed by returning None for the observation that completes
calibration. Subsequent observations are tested correctly against
a calibration set they are not part of.

All 44 conformal tests pass. Test updated to expect None on
calibration-completing call and Some on subsequent call.

Session total: 210 files, 10 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
